commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review remains needed because live AGX proof and provider-contract approval cannot be supplied by automation, even though the docs fix itself is narrow.; Needs attention: The code no longer disables host-key checking, but the new AGX BYO-key SSH trust boundary still needs maintainer approval and real-service proof.; Review finding: [P2] Fix the AGX SSH key configuration example — docs/providers/agx.md:67 (sha=eae03061b20855d8473e7814e1ae10c2df283ae7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a built-in AGX SSH-lease provider with AGX config, provider registration, tests, docs, provider metadata, and generated provider tables.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR. Current-main and release searches confirm AGX is absent; the useful validation path is redacted live AGX warmup, status, run, and stop proof against the real workspace gateway.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review remains needed because live AGX proof and provider-contract approval cannot be supplied by automation, even though the docs fix itself is narrow.

target.title: feat: add AGX microVM SSH-lease provider
target.body:
## Summary

Adds `provider: agx` for direct AGX Linux microVM leases, closing https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/341.

AGX currently publishes an SSH-first interface: `ssh <user>+<instance>@workspace.agx.so`. This PR models AGX as an **SSH-lease backend** (`ProviderKindSSHLease`) with no Crabbox-owned AGX control-plane client. Core keeps ownership of slugs, local claims, SSH/rsync sync, command streaming, and status/list rendering from local claim state. The AGX adapter only builds the documented workspace-gateway SSH target and lets AGX provision/reclaim instances on its side.

## What's included

- `internal/providers/agx/`: provider registration, SSH-only acquire/resolve/list/status/release behavior, config flags, and tests.
- Registration in `internal/providers/all` and provider registry coverage.
- `AGXConfig` config surface for `workspace`, `user`, and `workRoot`.
- Docs: `docs/providers/agx.md`, provider metadata, regenerated provider matrix, README provider table, and source map.

## Capabilities

`FeatureSSH` and `FeatureCrabboxSync`; Linux only; `CoordinatorNever`. AGX does **not** advertise `FeatureCleanup` because AGX has no published inventory/delete API. `--class`, `--type`, and `--tailscale` are rejected.

## Config / secret implications

No AGX API token is stored or passed on argv. Authentication uses the operator's configured SSH key, which must already be accepted by AGX onboarding.

```yaml
provider: agx
ssh:
  key: ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
agx:
  workspace: workspace.agx.so
  user: root
  workRoot: /root/crabbox
```

## Early-access caveat

AGX ships Summer 2026 and currently publishes no stable control-plane API, auth API, or CLI. Remote inventory, cleanup, and explicit lifecycle management are intentionally out of scope until AGX publishes that contract.

## Verification

Local maintainer repair validation passed on the rebased branch:

```text
go test ./internal/providers/agx ./internal/providers/all ./internal/cli ./cmd/crabbox
node scripts/generate-provider-matrix.mjs --check
node scripts/check-command-docs.mjs
node scripts/check-docs-links.mjs
go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.45.0 -test ./...
go vet ./...
go build -trimpath -o bin/crabbox ./cmd/crabbox
```

Live AGX warmup/run/stop proof is still required before merge.
target.author: zozo123

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: vincentkoc
